title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to load the login page after clicking the login button.

title: Profile update issue
description: Users cannot update their profile picture.

title: Dashboard statistics incorrect
description: Sales data does not match actual transactions.

title: Password reset email not sent
description: Customers are not receiving password reset emails.

title: Mobile view layout broken
description: UI elements overlap on small screen devices.

title: Search function slow
description: Product search takes more than 5 seconds to load results.

title: Order history missing
description: Previous orders are not visible in user account.

title: Coupon code invalid error
description: Valid coupon codes show invalid error message.

title: Logout button not working
description: Users remain logged in after clicking logout.

title: Notification badge not updating
description: Unread notification count does not update in real-time.

title: File upload failed
description: Users receive an error while uploading documents.
